title: Binary Framing & Multiplexing
description: Deconstruct the HTTP/2 binary framing layer and its role in multiplexing requests. Explain how HTTP/2 multiplexing mitigates application-level Head-of-Line (HoL) blocking. Identify the remaining TCP-level HoL blocking risks even with HTTP/2.
objectives: Deconstruct the HTTP/2 binary framing layer and its role in multiplexing requests.
Explain how HTTP/2 multiplexing mitigates application-level Head-of-Line (HoL) blocking.
Identify the remaining TCP-level HoL blocking risks even with HTTP/2.
